Full held-out oracle 7/7 GREEN (enforced-missing->1, foreign->1, advisory->0, grandfathered->0, workflow step+audit). Mutation-checked: always-not-enforced->missing/foreign RED; always-enforce->grandfathered RED. Pre-flight lint+typecheck clean, config/cli/verify-opcert regression 82 PASS. 4214 make test running bi0zjcn4v.
FOUR children implemented (368c,42d1 closed; e4df,4214 pushed). Remaining: ee0b (trusted remote+AWS; review running bqzpptab9), 8f1d (HMAC removal), 6a89 (docs).
